summary.business_type: Freelance Web Developer / Professional Services (B2B, local + national, Brazil)
top_findings: Zero Google organic presence — site not appearing in any search queries for the domain
No Google Business Profile — blocks all local pack / Maps visibility for Belém market
All sitemap lastmod dates identical — disables crawl prioritization signals
No LCP image preload hint — missing easy LCP improvement
Only 6 published articles — insufficient content base for SEO authority
quick_wins: Submit sitemap to Google Search Console and verify indexation
Create Google Business Profile (free, high impact for local SEO)
Add <link rel="preload"> for hero-img.webp in BaseLayout.astro
Fix contactOption: TollFree in Person schema (remove or replace)

findings.title: Zero Google organic presence
findings.description: site:luanalves.com.br and brand searches return zero domain results. Site may be new/unindexed or facing crawling delays.
findings.recommendation: Submit sitemap to Google Search Console. Verify indexation. Request indexing for homepage and key service pages.

findings.title: /sitemap.xml returns 404
findings.description: robots.txt correctly points to /sitemap-index.xml but /sitemap.xml returns 404. Legacy crawlers and some tools expect /sitemap.xml.
findings.recommendation: Add redirect from /sitemap.xml to /sitemap-index.xml via vercel.json redirects, or generate a /sitemap.xml alias.

findings.title: All sitemap lastmod dates identical
findings.description: Every URL in sitemap-0.xml has lastmod: 2026-06-05T03:00:00.000Z regardless of actual content age.
findings.recommendation: Use per-page real modification timestamps in sitemap generation. Astro has sitemap integration options for this.

findings.title: No LCP image preload hint
findings.description: hero-img.webp has fetchpriority=high but no <link rel="preload"> in <head>. Preload scanner discovers LCP resource earlier.
findings.recommendation: Add <link rel="preload" as="image" href="/assets/hero-img.webp" type="image/webp" fetchpriority="high" /> in BaseLayout.astro head for homepage namespace.

findings.title: contactOption: TollFree incorrect in schema
findings.description: BaseLayout.astro line 56 sets contactOption: TollFree on WhatsApp ContactPoint. WhatsApp is not a toll-free line.
findings.recommendation: Remove contactOption field or replace with contactType: 'customer support'.

categories.name: Content Quality & E-E-A-T
what_works: Author bio with name, role, location on all articles
Social links (Instagram, LinkedIn) on author cards
FAQ blocks on service pages and articles
Proper pt-BR language and accents throughout

findings.title: Only 6 published articles
findings.description: Thin content base for a content-SEO strategy. Competitors in 'criação de sites' maintain 30-100+ articles.
findings.recommendation: Publish 2-3 articles/month. Prioritize FAQ/pricing/comparison keywords. Next articles: 'como escolher hospedagem para site', 'diferença entre site WordPress e Astro', 'o que é SEO técnico'.

findings.title: No external citations in articles
findings.description: Articles make industry claims without external source links. Hurts E-E-A-T Expertise and Trust signals.
findings.recommendation: Add 2-3 outbound links per article to IBGE data, Google Search Central docs, Semrush/Ahrefs public research.

findings.title: dateModified equals datePublished on all articles
findings.description: BlogPosting schema and article display show same date for published and modified. Google uses freshness as a ranking signal.
findings.recommendation: Add dateModified field to InsightPublishedPost type and pass separately in schema.

findings.title: Some articles lack real hero images
findings.description: Template falls back to generic og-cover.webp for articles without heroImage. Reduces rich snippet visual differentiation.
findings.recommendation: Create unique 1200x800 webp hero images for all 6 existing articles.

findings.title: Insights listing H1 is just 'Insights'
findings.description: Weak H1, misses keyword intent. Title tag already uses the full phrase.
findings.recommendation: Change H1 to match title: 'Insights sobre Desenvolvimento Web e SEO'.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: @graph pattern in BaseLayout for clean multi-type schema
BreadcrumbList on service pages and articles
Service schema on all service pages
FAQPage schema on service and article pages
BlogPosting schema with full metadata on articles

findings.title: contactOption: TollFree factually wrong
findings.description: Schema.org validation will flag this. WhatsApp is not a toll-free number.
findings.recommendation: Remove contactOption from the WhatsApp ContactPoint in BaseLayout.astro.

findings.title: No LocalBusiness schema on Belém page
findings.description: Only Service schema present. LocalBusiness/ProfessionalService schema required for local rich results.
findings.recommendation: Add ProfessionalService schema with PostalAddress to /criacao-de-sites-belem/ in servicePages.ts.

findings.title: Portfolio listing lacks ItemList schema
findings.description: 7 portfolio case pages are not represented as structured data on the listing page.
findings.recommendation: Add ItemList schema to /portfolio/ with ListItem for each case study.

findings.title: dateModified = datePublished in BlogPosting
findings.description: Reduces freshness signal to Google for article content.
findings.recommendation: Track and emit real dateModified per article.

findings.title: No ImageObject schema
findings.description: Hero images lack ImageObject with width, height, contentUrl.
findings.recommendation: Add ImageObject to BlogPosting and Person schemas.

findings.title: No priceRange in ProfessionalService
findings.description: Missing optional but useful signal for Knowledge Panel and local results.
findings.recommendation: Add priceRange: 'R$1.500–R$8.000' to ProfessionalService schema.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: Self-hosted fonts, no external CDN blocking

findings.title: Missing LCP image preload
findings.description: No <link rel=preload> for hero-img.webp. fetchpriority alone is weaker than a head preload hint.
findings.recommendation: Add preload link in BaseLayout.astro head, scoped to homepage namespace.

findings.title: No srcset/sizes on hero image
findings.description: Full 1086px image downloaded on all viewports including mobile 375px.
findings.recommendation: Generate 480w, 768w, 1086w variants and add srcset + sizes attributes.

findings.title: Material Symbols full font loaded
findings.description: Full icon font likely 400-500kb; only ~20 icons used.
findings.recommendation: Subset icon font to used codepoints using pyftsubset or Google variable font subsetting.

findings.title: Barba.js transition JS overhead
findings.description: Page transitions add bundle weight and potential for Barba head-sync issues (documented in AGENTS.md).
findings.recommendation: Monitor LCP on page transitions. Ensure all head elements are covered by Barba sync selectors.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness (GEO)
what_works: llms.txt exists with accurate professional profile
Article heading hierarchy with IDs for passage-level citation
Long-form articles are strong AI snippet candidates

findings.title: llms.txt lacks service-specific detail
findings.description: Current llms.txt is a general profile. AI tools need granular data: pricing, process, tech stack, client outcomes.
findings.recommendation: Expand llms.txt with per-service sections and client result summaries.

findings.title: No llms-full.txt
findings.description: Extended content file for AI crawlers not present.
findings.recommendation: Create /llms-full.txt with article excerpts, portfolio summaries, FAQ content.

findings.title: No speakable schema on articles
findings.description: Speakable marks passages for AI assistant and TTS response eligibility.
findings.recommendation: Add speakable property to BlogPosting schema referencing article intro and key sections.

findings.title: Brand disambiguation weak
findings.description: 'Luan Alves' is a common name. No Wikidata entity or strong disambiguation signals.
findings.recommendation: Ensure LinkedIn and GitHub sameAs URLs are correct and profiles are active. Consider Wikidata entry.

findings.title: No Google Business Profile
findings.description: No GBP listing found for Luan Alves in Belém. GBP is the primary driver of local pack and Maps visibility.
findings.recommendation: Create GBP at business.google.com. Category: Web designer. Include website, phone, service area.

findings.title: No LocalBusiness schema on Belém page
findings.description: Page lacks structured local business data required for local rich results.
findings.recommendation: Add ProfessionalService schema with PostalAddress to the Belém service page.

findings.title: NAP incomplete — no address
findings.description: Name and phone present but no address. NAP consistency requires address.
findings.recommendation: Use city-level address (Belém, PA, Brasil) consistently across all digital presence.

findings.title: No local directory citations
findings.description: Not listed on major BR business directories.
findings.recommendation: Submit to Empresas.com.br, Guiamais, Apontador with consistent NAP.

findings.title: Zero Google reviews
findings.description: Reviews are a top local ranking factor.
findings.recommendation: After GBP creation, ask past clients for reviews with direct review link.

categories.name: Images
what_works: Alt text present on hero image and portfolio images

findings.title: No srcset on hero image
findings.description: Full resolution image served to all viewports.
findings.recommendation: Add srcset with responsive variants (480w, 768w, 1086w).

findings.title: Some article hero images are placeholders
findings.description: Articles without heroImage fall back to generic og-cover.webp.
findings.recommendation: Add unique hero images to all 6 articles.

findings.title: Portfolio images may be placeholders
findings.description: AGENTS.md notes 'Some portfolio media paths may be placeholders.' Broken images would hurt E-E-A-T signals.
findings.recommendation: Audit public/assets/ to verify all portfolio images exist and load correctly.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Submit sitemap to Google Search Console + verify indexation of all 21 URLs
Create Google Business Profile for Belém market
Fix contactOption: TollFree in BaseLayout.astro (line 56) — remove the field
Add <link rel=preload> for hero-img.webp in BaseLayout.astro head
Add LocalBusiness/ProfessionalService schema to /criacao-de-sites-belem/ page

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Add /sitemap.xml redirect → /sitemap-index.xml in vercel.json
Fix sitemap lastmod to use real per-page modification dates
Add dateModified field to InsightPublishedPost type + schema
Expand llms.txt with service pricing, process, and client outcome sections
Create hero images for all 6 insight articles (1200x800 webp)
Add outbound citations to articles (2-3 per article)
Add ItemList schema to /portfolio/ page

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Publish 2-3 new insight articles targeting FAQ/comparison keywords
Submit to top 10 Brazilian business directories with consistent NAP
Add srcset/sizes to hero image for responsive delivery
Create llms-full.txt with extended content
Add speakable schema to BlogPosting
Change Insights listing H1 to match title tag
Add priceRange to ProfessionalService schema
Request Google reviews from past clients after GBP setup

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Monitor Google Search Console weekly for indexation, CTR, impressions
Track GBP views, calls, direction requests monthly
Subset Material Symbols icon font to reduce font payload
Add ImageObject schema to article and person schemas
Continue 2 articles/month cadence
Audit portfolio case pages for completeness and outcome summaries
